title: 2026 F1 Chinese GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: New regs or not - McLaren-Mercedes in the race (or not): nothing could detract from the enormity of this day in Shanghai - from the first GP win for Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli. From the pole, he seized the race lead from Ferrari's Sir Lewis Hamilton on lap two - and was thereafter never headed.  Lewis re-applied pressure after the pit stops; and team-mate, George Russell, was up their in P2, pushing hard, as the race unfolded.  Kimi, though, was unperturbed.  His win was as decisive as it was auda

title: 2026 F1 Chinese GP RACE Analysis
description:
2026 F1 Chinese GP RACE Analysis.

Kimi Antonelli takes his first Formula 1 Grand Prix victory at the Chinese Grand Prix, delivering a stunning drive in Shanghai. After starting on the front row, the young Mercedes driver controlled the race with impressive pace, tyre management, and composure under pressure.

title: 2026 F1 CHINESE GP Sprint Qualifying analysis by Peter Windsor
description: No surprise to see the Mercs on the front row again but McLaren-Mercedes are now right up there with Ferrari.  Lando Norris qualified P3 behind George Russell and Kimi Antonelli, ahead of Sir Lewis Hamilton (Ferrari), Oscar Piastri in the other McLaren-Mercedes, and Ferrari's Charles Leclerc. Pierre Gasly was an excellent P7 for Alpine-Mercedes, beating a dismayed Max Verstappen (Red Bull-RBPT Ford). description: The factory Mercedes team - George Russell heading Kimi Antonelli - duly finished one-two in Melbourne on Sunday, exhibiting more power, more downforce, more grip and more balance than all of their opposition - and capped all of that with perfect strategy calls. title: Australian grand prix Review | Day 10 of learning #F1 #drivetosurvive  #f1explained
description:
Ferrari… we have the car, we have the drivers… but strategy?”

What a crazy season opener at the Australian Grand Prix 🏁
George Russell wins the race, leading a Mercedes 1-2 with Kimi Antonelli, while Ferrari finishes P3 and P4 with Leclerc and Hamilton despite strong pace.

Meanwhile Max Verstappen climbed from P20 to P6, one of the drives of the race.

The 2026 F1 season has started with drama already.

title: 2026 F1 Australian GP QUALIFYING Analysis - Melbourne
description:
2026 F1 Australian GP QUALIFYING Analysis - Melbourne. Qualifying at the Australian Grand Prix delivered a huge result, with George Russell putting his Mercedes on pole position at Albert Park after a tightly contested session.
